risk_triggers: Premium customer with billing issue after cancellation
Previous interactions with support were unsuccessful
Threat of public escalation on LinkedIn
Threat to block future payments via finance team
High sentiment of frustration and urgency
recommended_sla_action: Immediately escalate to billing support for expedited review and resolution, and provide a personal apology and update to the customer.
reasoning_summary: The combination of a premium customer, a billing issue post-cancellation, unsuccessful prior contacts, and explicit threats of public and financial escalation, along with a high frustration sentiment, necessitates URGENT priority and CRITICAL escalation risk. Prompt and personalized attention is required to mitigate reputational and financial risks.
